title: campanula mollis
intro: Campanula mollis, also known as soft harebell, is a perennial flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Campanula mollis include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and promote wound healing. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, where it is combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
